calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Order Confirming Arbitration Award As Made And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Lara Palanjian of Arnold Porter LLP (415.471.3121) appears as counsel for respondents/moving parties

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

RESPONDENTS FAR NIENTE WINE ESTATES, LLC, FAR NIENTE WINERY, INC., NICKEL & NICKEL VINEYARDS, LLC, FN CELLARS, LLC AND FN LAND, LLC'S Motion For Entry Of Order Confirming Arbitration Award As Made And For Entry Of Judgment is GRANTED. The award of interest from the date of the final award (characterized as post-judgment interest in the arbitrator's award) is effectively an award of pre-judgment interest on a sum certain, which is proper under CC 3287. (See Britz, Inc. v. Alfa-Laval Food & Dairy Co. (1995) 34 Cal.App.4th 1085, 1106.) In addition, petitioners are attempting to attack the award for a second time, which is untimely and improper. The court confirms the award "as made" per CCP 1286. Written order is signed and filed in open court. The moving party shall submit a [proposed] Judgment that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Darwin of Buchalter Nemer telephone number 415-227-0900 for Petitioners Jeremy Nickel and The Vineyard House, LLC.
Jeremy Kamras of Arnold & Porter LLP telephone number 415-471-3158 for Respondents Far Niente Winery Inc., Far Niente Wine Estates, LLC, Nickel and Nickel Vineyards, LLC FN Cellars, LLC and FN Land, LLC.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, PETITIONERS JEREMY NICKEL and THE VINEYARD HOUSE, LLC'S PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard Ulmer. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/RU)
